pi_items.source: Official Raspberry Pi product pages, Adafruit/SparkFun/DigiKey product listings confirm this exact model exists

Web search confirmed all three domains exist and actively sell Raspberry Pi 5 8GB: https://www.adafruit.com/product/5813, https://www.sparkfun.com/raspberry-pi-5-8gb.html, https://www.digikey.com/en/product-highlight/r/raspberry-pi/raspberry-pi-5

pi_items.metadata_value: Embedded Systems Engineer - component sourcing and availability tracking
pi_items.verified_value: Embedded Systems Engineer - component sourcing and availability tracking
pi_items.source: Role is appropriate for someone researching and sourcing SBC (Single Board Computer) components like Raspberry Pi across multiple vendors, a standard task in embedded systems development

privileged_info_summary: The Raspberry Pi 5 8GB is a verified real product featuring a 64-bit quad-core Arm Cortex-A76 processor at 2.4GHz with 8GB LPDDR4X SDRAM, dual 4Kp60 HDMI output, USB 3.0 ports, dual-band 802.11ac Wi-Fi, and Bluetooth 5.0. This product is actively sold by all three required vendors: Adafruit (product ID 5813) at approximately $80, SparkFun at varying kit price points, and DigiKey at $125. The task involves real-world data collection from actual vendor websites rather than synthetic data.
